message:
chore(beads): close 4px2f after fix landed in 0b788d26

br-4px2f resolved by parallel agent's commit 0b788d26 which adds
prune_expired_events_locked() helper called on the cache-full path
from both claim_event() and record_event(), plus regression test.
86/86 webhook handler tests pass.
